name: sense-memory
summary: Sovereign persistence for AI agents — encrypted key-value memories and journal entries on Nostr relays

NOSTRKEY_PASSPHRASE.description: Passphrase to decrypt the agent's identity file for signing and encrypting memories

NOSTR_NSEC.description: Agent's Nostr private key (nsec or hex) — alternative to file-based identity

NOSTR_RELAY.description: Relay URL for storing memories (default: wss://relay.nostrkeep.com)
